allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; print\('App loaded OK'\); print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'path'\)]\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "import httpx; r = httpx.get\('http://127.0.0.1:8000/health', timeout=5\); print\(r.status_code, r.text\)")
Bash(venv/bin/python -c "import httpx; r = httpx.get\('http://127.0.0.1:8000/health', timeout=5\); print\(r.status_code, r.text\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.core.config import settings; print\('ALLOWED_ORIGINS:', settings.ALLOWED_ORIGINS\); print\('List:', settings.allowed_origins_list\)")
